text:
There is 1 Linear issue in 'done' state that is not closed by any merged pull request, despite being claimed as closed by at least one PR:

- **ENG-134**: Rate limiter false positives — follow-up

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def done-linear (filter #(= (:state %) "done") (linear_issues)))

(def merged-prs (filter #(= (:state %) "merged") (github_pull_requests)))

(def closed-issue-ids (set (map :closes_linear merged-prs)))

(def open-done-issues (filter #(contains? closed-issue-ids (:id %)) done-linear))

(count open-done-issues)

(map :id open-done-issues)"}
